mapper.insert: MERGE INTO synced_ledger_records t USING (VALUES (#{id}, #{recordId}, #{inspectionDate}, #{content}, #{docxPath}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)) AS s(id, record_id, inspection_date, content, docx_path, sync_version, synced_at) ON t.id = s.id WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET record_id = s.record_id, inspection_date = s.inspection_date, content = s.content, docx_path = s.docx_path, sync_version = s.sync_version, synced_at = s.synced_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (id, record_id, inspection_date, content, docx_path, sync_version, synced_at) VALUES (s.id, s.record_id, s.inspection_date, s.content, s.docx_path, s.sync_version, s.synced_at)

INSERT INTO synced_ledger_records ( id, record_id, inspection_date, content, docx_path, sync_version, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{recordId}, #{inspectionDate}, #{content}, #{docxPath}, #{syncVersion}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE record_id = VALUES(record_id), inspection_date = VALUES(inspection_date), content = VALUES(content), docx_path = VALUES(docx_path), sync_version = VALUES(sync_version), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
